race.comment: MISS DEE REIGN (9) jumped in trip second-up when raced on the speed for a courageous third over 1300m at Scone. Will take catching from the draw and proven in the going. Set to peak. MOSGIEL DAISY (6) drifted back from her wide draw last start then hit the line hard to score over 1300m at this track. Measures up nicely and the blinkers come off. Keep safe. BARCELONA EXPRESS (5) improved sharply when given a sit before closing quickly for a narrow third over 1250m at this track. Sure to be thereabouts again. NIKODY'S BINKS (12) passed fit to race, then took control early before he dropped right out to finish last over 1509m at Port Macquarie. Just over five weeks between runs heading into this and assess on the big win at Port Macquarie three-back. Improver.
